modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: New employee needs assistance with setting up an email account.

full_description_text:
- I was on a call with a help desk analyst who was helping a new employee.  
- The employee was unsure about how to get their email account set up.  
- We discussed some common questions related to employee email accounts during the call.
short_description: New employee needs assistance with setting up an email account.
